summary:
You are given an integer array nums and a window size k. Imagine a window of k consecutive elements sliding from the left end of the array to the right, one position at a time.

Return an array containing the maximum value found in the window at each position, in order from the leftmost window to the rightmost.

examples.explanation: There is only one window covering the whole array, and its maximum is 11.

constraints: The output has nums.length - k + 1 entries
